case.title: Philip Morris USA Inc. v. Williams

opinion.p: 556 U. S. ____ (2009) 556 U. S. ____ (2009) 556 U. S. ____ (2009) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES NO. 07-1216 PHILIP MORRIS USA INC., PETITIONER v. MAYOLA WILLIAMS, personal representative of the ES- TATE OF JESSE D. WILLIAMS, DECEASED
on writ of certiorari to the supreme court of oregon
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
